# JUNIE_HANDOFF_PACKAGE.md - V7

## Purpose
Engineering handoff package for independent Junie review.

## Required Sections
- Executive Summary
- Acceptance Matrix
- Validation Matrix
- Roadmap Coverage Matrix
- Runtime Ledger Integrity Matrix
- Product Bug History
- Runtime Evolution History
- Technical Debt
- Known Risks
- Open HITL Decisions
- Release Recommendation
